sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29931" key="e)g" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγ</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν</foreign> in compos. before <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γ κ χ ξ</foreign>; also for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκ</foreign> in Inscrr. and Pap. before <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δ λ μ</foreign>.</entryFree>
